title: catha multiflora
intro: Catha multiflora, also known as False Khat, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, headache, and inflammation due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Catha multiflora include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Catha multiflora include tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
